mapper.select:
SELECT d.drug_id AS drugId, d.drug_name AS drugName, d.specification, d.unit, SUM(si.sale_num) AS totalSalesNum, SUM(si.sale_num * si.sale_price) AS totalSalesAmount FROM sales_item si INNER JOIN sales_order so ON si.order_id = so.order_id INNER JOIN drug_info d ON si.drug_id = d.drug_id WHERE so.status = '已完成' AND DATE(so.order_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY d.drug_id, d.drug_name, d.specification, d.unit ORDER BY totalSalesAmount DESC
LIMIT #{limit}
SELECT COALESCE(SUM(total_amount), 0) FROM sales_order WHERE status = '已完成' AND DATE(order_time) BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}
